education.title: Education Background
education.details: School of Computer Science and Engineering | Artificial Intelligence | Bachelor Degree

items.position: Infrastructure R&D Platform | Infrastructure Technology Department | Product Group | Agent Product Manager Intern
items.description: **Meituan ITU 1024 Agent** is an internal enterprise-wide ReAct-mode Agent open to all product lines. It enhances R&D efficiency for business teams and serves all Meituan employees, focusing on solving multi-step reasoning, multi-source information retrieval, process collaboration, user consultation, and ticket handling scenarios. It also supports component teams in effect evaluation and independent operation iteration.
responsibilities: **Agent Evaluation System Construction**: To address the denominator fluctuation issue of existing business metrics over time and the pain point of difficult effect quantification of Agents in real scenarios, led the team to align on a unified understanding of **Agent Evaluation**; spearheaded the building of a benchmark evaluation dataset covering 6 core business scenarios with nearly 300 standard samples, and designed multi-dimensional evaluation metrics and evaluators. This increased the correlation coefficient between evaluation results and business metric fluctuations from 0.42 to 0.78, enabling the business side to stably judge the online effect of Agents.

**Agent Capability Development and Optimization**: Targeting the slow iteration pace of Agent capabilities, inaccurate user question routing, and model hallucinations, built and productized the **Skills** capability of Agents to atomize users' SOPs for Agents; led the design and evaluation verification of routing fine-tuning solutions, increasing the ratio of questions routed to the correct Agent in key scenarios from approximately 70% to 88%; meanwhile, complemented the hallucination detection and interception mechanism, reducing the exposure rate of obvious hallucinatory responses by about 30% in high-risk scenarios.

**Improving Vertical Task Performance Based on RL**: Identified the problems that high-ROI reports generated by LLMs were difficult to be adopted by the business and that the accuracy of automatic ticket tagging was lower than manual tagging. Proposed an optimization scheme that uses human feedback and tags to refine the model; introduced reinforcement learning and human reward and punishment mechanisms to iterate prompt strategies, increasing the adoption rate of high-ROI reports by the business by about 20% and the accuracy of automatic tagging for key tickets by about 44%, significantly improving the business's trust in and willingness to use intelligent capabilities.

**User Insight and Consumption Closure for Elephant Channel**: Focusing on the lack of data consumption in the 1024 Elephant Channel, connected the IM channel data acquisition link, performed text cleaning and cluster analysis on tens of thousands of user feedbacks, and summarized more than 10 high-frequency pain point clusters and corresponding typical scenarios; based on this, automatically output user insights and optimization directions for each component team, promoted 13 high-priority requirements into version planning, and observed a month-on-month decrease of about 12% in the number of related tickets in subsequent versions.

**Channel Access Reconstruction**: Identified the problems of high cost of rule understanding for users during access and difficult database maintenance for internal operations, reorganized the pre-sales and after-sales access processes and data structures; used AI Coding to quickly implement a user-friendly Web solution for access registration and backend management, reducing the number of operation steps for users to complete access applications by about 70%, helping the team achieve the full-year internal product channel access coverage target in Q1.

items.position: Product Solution Center | Product Group | Large Model Platform Product Manager Intern
items.description: **Zhipu Enterprise-Grade MaaS (Model-as-a-Service) Platform** is a full-lifecycle management and service platform for large models targeting global enterprise customers, and it is the largest source of revenue in Zhipu's IPO prospectus. Covering core functions such as model fine-tuning, model evaluation, and model serving, it helps enterprises quickly build privately deployed large model platforms.
responsibilities: **Core Module Design**: Led the product function design of three core modules of Enterprise-Grade MaaS V2.3: **Model Routing**, **Usage Statistics**, and **Log Mining**, clearly defined business logic, data flow, and GUI design, delivered 6 product requirement documents, and solved users' pain points and functional needs in multiple scenarios.

**Interaction Specification Reconstruction**: Fully reconstructed the pop-up interaction specifications for platform error messages and deletion operations, unified the pop-up copy, display logic, and user guidance paths for more than 10 scenarios, making it the platform's interactive design standard, directly promoting the reuse of front-end component libraries, and significantly improving user experience.

**Cutting-Edge Direction Research**: Conducted pre-research on **Agent Infra** and **Sandbox** technologies, deeply analyzed the sandbox application scenarios of Agent products such as Manus and Lindy, and referenced the product positioning of competitors such as E2B and Alibaba Cloud AgentBay, output research reports and delivered presentations to multiple departments, providing key inputs for Q4 product planning.

**Innovative Prototype Design**: Built interactive prototypes based on AI Coding, collaborated closely with multiple R&D teams including front-end, back-end, testing, and Infra, conducted more than 100 communications and decision-makings on demand details, and continuously iterated to ensure the successful launch of the project.

items.name: Graduate Admission System for PALM Lab, Southeast University
items.description: A B-end product oriented to real business scenarios. Led the demand analysis, product design, and development iteration in-depth for 8 months. Through continuous communication with lab supervisors and students, built a complete admission management product system. Currently, the number of applications has reached over 1,000, an increase of 71% compared with previous years, and has received high recognition from the client.
features: **Demand Analysis and Research**: Deeply explored the pain points of lab admissions, interviewed users and found that the traditional email application method was inefficient. Conducted product demand analysis and standardized the application process, improving application processing efficiency by 60%.

**User Permission System Design**: Established a complete user portrait system, designed differentiated functional modules for supervisors and students, and achieved refined business process control through permission management and routing design.

**Independent Development and Launch**: Independently completed the entire process from front-end page development, component library construction, back-end interface development, and database design to domain DNS resolution, cloud server deployment, Nginx configuration, SSL certificate application, and launch, which greatly exercised my technical horizon and PMO capabilities.

**User and Product Operation**: Established a user feedback collection mechanism, identified product optimization points through communication, continuously iterated product functions, and solved 80% of user feedback problems.

skills.title: About Me
items: **AI Pioneer Explorer**: Has been continuously tracking and deeply using various domestic and foreign large models in B-end and C-end business fields since the end of 2022, and is familiar with the functional characteristics and user experience differences of different products.

**LLM Engineering Experience**: Has experience in locally deploying large models such as DeepSeek R1 and Qwen 2.5 using Ollama; has Batch comparison engineering practice based on OneShot and FewShot; has completed text (Doubao 1.5 Pro) and audio (Meta MusicGen) large model fine-tuning engineering tasks based on SFT LoRA.

**Coding Capability**: As a core member of the Messenger Program Studio of Southeast University, has a solid technical background and full-stack development experience of front-end and back-end, and has undertaken multiple software projects inside and outside the university. Meanwhile, has successfully submitted PRs for new function development to open-source browser AI plugin repositories.

**Career Direction and Goal**: Keeps a close eye on the latest developments of AI large models at the model layer and application layer, firmly chooses the product direction, and is passionate about the Internet industry, AI productization and commercialization, especially the fundamental solutions of Agents in the internal enterprise environment. The goal is to become a frontier evangelist for Chinese mainland enterprises to realize the vertical business AI closed loop through **Agent + RL + Eval + Benchmark + Sandbox**.
